item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
that's 4 more than i need, pass
chili and cheese
diggin the fit
that is 100% her neck
what's it taste like?
fall/halloween is by far the best time for weather in my area
what about dipwads?
finally, a new liquid
we used to be a country, a proper country
can i go tv and say leela from futurama
ok
as a treat
mmm hmm
yes
animal hoarding is sickening but man what a great comment
amen brotha
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: World's closest bottom shelf meme dump! (You are here)
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Meet my god-fearing Nana.
Join for the games. Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Instead of blocking the scam account, I decided to accept the DM and allow the bottom shelf community to submit the unhinged replies they wanted me to send him. I was not disappointed. This inspired our new terrible streaming idea which will premiere tomorrow at 9:45pm CST.
Date with us! Disclaimer: We have no plans of leading anyone on. This will be in fun, lighthearted humor. We will let them off the hook early by telling them who we are shortly after initiating the conversation. twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Come heckle us. Follow the channel to be notified when we go live.
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: I am this old. Just the sounds ….
item.description:
The anticipation of the install was exciting at the time.
And Doom was arguably the game that really kick started the whole 3D gaming industry!
Nowadays you can run it on your toothbrush!!

item.description: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/nHHMuBgIbmY Almost half of Chicago’s parking meters are owned by the Abu Dhabi Investment Authority. The other half are owned by a shadowy company called Redoma

item.title: Now we all know about Flo
item.description: No one was more surprised than Christina Novak when the short online obituary she placed in the Kennebec Journal about her mom’s death went viral. “Let’s be clear. It’s a PSA and it’s no joke. It was written with sarcasm and relief, but it’s real,” Novak, 47, tells PEOPLE exclusively. “It was done in four sentences because I refused to spend another dollar on that woman.” https://www.yahoo.com/entertainment/daughters-4-sentence-obit-mom-120000728.html
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Fun fact, my Cindy (Devon Rex) is the best kitty in the whole wide world
item.dc:creator: ARedSM

item.title: My Caturday contribution: meet my new foster kittens!!
item.description:
I picked up ten new foster kittens yesterday, and Imgur came out in force to give me name ideas! So without further ado…meet the Salsa Kitties! Gordita here has a broken half tail but it doesn’t bother her. What DOES bother her is me. She’s miss hissy pants and runs from me but once I get her in my arms she is so sweet. And look how fluffy!
Luckily none of them look alike, which makes it so much easier to remember their names, and they don’t need collars which is awesome. This little boy is very vocal but cute
Ceviche is a climber - loves going vertical, in any way. Which right now means climbing me, but once I’m sure they’re entirely litter box trained and don’t have diarrhea, I’ll be setting up some cat trees. Edit: when I was naming them, I forgot that @TinyOctopus recommended “Pico” for this baby, and I like that better than “Ceviche” so she has been re-named!
Purrito gets his name because 1) all of you insisted that I name a kitten that, and 2) he purrs constantly! He had a mild eye infection but it’s not contagious and he’s gotten much better over the last few days at the shelter being on meds.
I can’t remember who said it, but an Imgurian saw a video of this orange boy being very derpy and said we should name him Flan because his brain is basically mush. And the name just fit!
Taquito is the smallest so he deserves an “-ito” name. He’s very shy but sweet
I don’t know what it was about this little guy, but he just strikes me as a kitten who needs a big name. He’s also shy and not very snuggly yet, but he’ll get there.
Nacho here came into the shelter a few days ago with a de-gloved tail, so they had to amputate it. He’s still recovering but has settled into his new family very well.
And little Queso is a quintessential lap kitty. He always waits patiently until I sit down so he can climb in. I’m partial to orange kitties, and I wuv him very much. (Edit: I FORGOT ONE!! Thank you @SirVG for pointing this out!! Forgive me, Chimichanga!! https://imgur.com/gallery/4lWFxP0 )
They are helping to fill the hole in my heart after giving Jasmne up yesterday. This is my new reality, and I couldn’t be happier.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: I did it!
item.description:
I’m 39 years old, and I’ve wanted a little pride flag tattoo ever since I was little. I did it! Ignore the scratch, I have cats. :P
Pickles approves. Pickles approves of everything though.
item.dc:creator: liathum
